title: viola × uechtritziana
intro: Viola × uechtritziana, also known as the hybrid pansy, is a plant species within the Violaceae family, resulting from the cross between Viola lactea and Viola mirabilis. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Viola × uechtritziana include its potential to reduce stress, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Viola × uechtritziana can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
